prompt: Generate a sankey diagram icon. Use the exact color palette and graphic style from the reference image of infographic icons.
prompt_refined: Generate a sankey diagram icon. The icon must use the exact color palette and graphic style of the infographic icons in image 1, characterized by a flat design, thick dark outlines, and subtle drop shadows.
objects: Vertical bars on the left side
Vertical bars on the right side
Flowing bands connecting the left and right bars
Thick dark outlines on all elements
Subtle drop shadows on all elements
